ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the city belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., Gold, Silver, Platinum) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., coin, bar, jewelry) */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the sale was made */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the sale was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Time the sale was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year (e.g., 2004, 2005) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales executive */,
  "executive_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales executive */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales executive */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the sales executive operates in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales executive */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales executive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_executives_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the regional manager */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the regional manager oversees */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the regional manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Sales Executive, Regional Manager, Analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged out */,
  "login_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., Sales Report, Product Report) */,
  "report_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the report format (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the report format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report export */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being exported */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format the report is being exported in */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the report was exported */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Time the report was exported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_exports_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES report_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_exports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES sales_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer payment */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_payments_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product inventory */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the order is for */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order status */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
